name: Maintenance and Repairs
text: The Landlord and Tenant shall be responsible for maintenance and repairs as follows: (a) The Landlord shall be responsible for: (i) major structural repairs, including repairs to the roof, load-bearing walls, external walls, foundations, and common areas; (ii) repair or replacement of major fixtures provided by the Landlord, including electrical fittings, plumbing, and sanitary fittings, attributable to fair wear and tear; and (iii) compliance with building safety requirements under applicable municipal laws. (b) The Tenant shall be responsible for: (i) day-to-day maintenance and minor repairs within the Premises; (ii) maintaining the Premises in a clean and hygienic condition; (iii) not making any structural alterations without prior written consent of the Landlord; and (iv) restoring the Premises to its original condition, reasonable wear and tear excepted, upon vacation. The Tenant shall promptly notify the Landlord of any damage requiring major repair.
invalid_if: Maintenance obligations imposed on Tenant that are the legal responsibility of the Landlord under TPA 1882 S.108
